members.name: SetApplicationThreadType
members.signature: public bool SetApplicationThreadType(int threadType, int threadId)
members.summary: Sets the thread type of the given thread, so that the XR runtime can adjust its scheduling priority accordingly. [param thread_id] refers to the OS thread id (ie from [code]gettid()[/code]). When [param thread_id] is [code]0[/code], it will set the thread type of the current thread. [b]NOTE:[/b] The id returned by [method Thread.get_id] is incompatible with [param thread_id].

values.name: THREAD_TYPE_APPLICATION_MAIN
values.summary: Hints to the XR runtime that the thread is doing time critical CPU tasks.

values.name: THREAD_TYPE_APPLICATION_WORKER
values.summary: Hints to the XR runtime that the thread is doing background CPU tasks.

values.name: THREAD_TYPE_RENDERER_MAIN
values.summary: Hints to the XR runtime that the thread is doing time critical graphics device tasks.

values.name: THREAD_TYPE_RENDERER_WORKER
values.summary: Hints to the XR runtime that the thread is doing background graphics device tasks.

constants.name: THREAD_TYPE_RENDERER_MAIN

constants.name: THREAD_TYPE_RENDERER_WORKER
